description:
Rewrite the BICC homepage hero (cover section) to emphasise active project
capabilities instead of the previous generic "trusted partner" tagline.
New hero has a project-oriented H1, a lead paragraph naming the actual
service lines (vertical builds, roads, demolition, project management),
and two CTAs anchoring to existing on-page sections (#our-services and
#contact-us). Sections below the cover (OUR SERVICES, ABOUT US, CONTACT US)
are preserved verbatim from the production baseline.
